mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND enabled = TRUE AND deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, display_name, email, phone, department_id, enabled, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{departmentId}, #{enabled}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE deleted = FALSE
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
display_name = #{displayName}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, department_id = #{departmentId}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
UPDATE users SET deleted = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
